name: sinofuse
description: Sinofuse (Xi'an Sinofuse Electronics Co., Ltd. / 西安中熔电气股份有限公司) is a leading Chinese manufacturer of circuit protection devices, specializing in fuses for new energy vehicles, energy storage systems, and industrial applications.
longDescription: Sinofuse (Xi'an Sinofuse Electronics Co., Ltd., 西安中熔电气股份有限公司, stock code: 301031) is a professional circuit protection device manufacturer established in 2007, specializing in the research, development, and production of fuses for new energy vehicles, energy storage systems, photovoltaic inverters, and industrial applications. As a publicly listed company on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange's ChiNext board, Sinofuse has become a trusted supplier for major automotive OEMs and energy companies in China and globally. The company holds multiple international certifications including UL, CSA, VDE, CCC, and TUV, ensuring product quality meets global standards. Sinofuse's product portfolio covers EV fuses, energy storage fuses, photovoltaic fuses, and industrial fuses, providing comprehensive circuit protection solutions from tens to thousands of amps.

coreProducts.name: EV Fuses
coreProducts.description: High-voltage DC fuses for electric vehicle battery packs, motors, and charging systems with ratings up to 1000VDC

coreProducts.name: Energy Storage Fuses
coreProducts.description: Specialized fuses for battery energy storage systems, inverters, and power conversion systems

coreProducts.name: Photovoltaic Fuses
coreProducts.description: Solar fuses for PV inverters, combiner boxes, and solar power systems with high DC voltage ratings

coreProducts.name: Industrial Fuses
coreProducts.description: General industrial fuses for power distribution, motor protection, and control systems

industries.name: New Energy Vehicles
industries.description: Circuit protection for EV battery packs, drive motors, onboard chargers, and DC/DC converters

industries.name: Energy Storage Systems
industries.description: Reliable protection for utility-scale and commercial battery energy storage systems

industries.name: Solar Power

seoTitle: Sinofuse (Zhongrong) Fuse Distributor | EV, Energy Storage, Solar Protection
seoDescription: Authorized Sinofuse distributor providing high-voltage DC fuses for electric vehicles, energy storage systems, and solar applications. Technical support and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Sinofuse (Zhongrong) products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is a core authorized distributor of Sinofuse (Xi'an Sinofuse Electronics Co., Ltd., 西安中熔电气股份有限公司) circuit protection products. We maintain strategic inventory of Sinofuse high-voltage DC fuses for EV, energy storage, and solar applications. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine products with full factory warranty, technical support from certified FAEs, and competitive pricing. Our partnership with Sinofuse enables us to offer fast delivery, application engineering support, and access to the latest product releases.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify current inventory and pricing for your specific Sinofuse fuse requirements.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Sinofuse circuit protection products?
faqs.answer: Sinofuse offers several competitive advantages in high-voltage DC circuit protection: 1) Leading market position in China's new energy vehicle and energy storage fuse market; 2) Comprehensive high-voltage DC fuse portfolio covering 500V to 1500VDC ratings; 3) High breaking capacity up to 100kA for reliable short-circuit protection; 4) Full automotive certifications including IATF 16949 for EV applications; 5) Cost-effective solutions with competitive pricing compared to international brands; 6) Fast lead times and local technical support for Asia-Pacific customers. Sinofuse is a publicly listed company (stock code: 301031) with strong R&D capabilities and manufacturing scale.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate Sinofuse products for your application through sample testing. Contact our FAE for side-by-side performance comparisons with international brands.

faqs.question: How do Sinofuse fuses compare to international brands like Littelfuse and Bussmann?
faqs.answer: Sinofuse fuses offer comparable performance to international brands at more competitive pricing, particularly in high-voltage DC applications. Key comparisons: 1) Electrical performance - Sinofuse fuses meet or exceed IEC and UL standards with similar time-current characteristics; 2) Breaking capacity - comparable high breaking ratings up to 100kA for DC applications; 3) Voltage ratings - extensive high-voltage DC portfolio up to 1500VDC for solar and EV applications; 4) Physical dimensions - industry-standard footprints ensure drop-in compatibility; 5) Certification - full UL, CSA, VDE, TUV certifications equivalent to international competitors; 6) Price - typically 20-40% lower cost than equivalent international brand fuses. For critical applications, we recommend sample testing to verify performance in your specific application.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request samples for comparative testing in your application. Our FAE can provide detailed technical comparisons.

faqs.question: What industries and applications are Sinofuse products suitable for?
faqs.answer: Sinofuse products serve diverse industries with focus on new energy applications: 1) Electric Vehicles - battery pack protection, motor drives, onboard chargers, DC/DC converters with high-voltage DC fuses; 2) Energy Storage - utility-scale and commercial BESS, inverters, power conversion systems; 3) Solar Power - photovoltaic inverters, combiner boxes, DC distribution with 1000-1500VDC ratings; 4) Industrial - power distribution, motor protection, railway systems; 5) Charging Infrastructure - DC fast charging stations, charging piles. Sinofuse specializes in high-voltage DC applications where traditional AC fuses are not suitable.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our industry-specific solutions or contact our FAE team for application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Sinofuse products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Sinofuse products: 1) Fuse selection assistance - helping choose the right current rating, voltage rating, and breaking capacity for your DC application; 2) Application engineering - reviewing circuit designs for optimal protection coordination; 3) Failure analysis - investigating fuse operations and recommending solutions; 4) Regulatory guidance - assisting with UL, IEC, and automotive certification requirements; 5) Custom solutions - working with Sinofuse for special requirements; 6) Sample evaluation - providing samples for testing and validation. Our FAE team has deep expertise in high-voltage DC protection for EV and energy storage applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team early in your design phase for optimal fuse selection and integration guidance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Sinofuse fuse for my EV or energy storage application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right high-voltage DC fuse involves several key considerations: 1) Voltage rating - must exceed maximum DC system voltage (typically 500V, 750V, or 1000V+ for EV/energy storage); 2) Current rating - typically 1.25x to 1.5x normal operating current, considering continuous and peak loads; 3) Breaking capacity - must exceed maximum prospective short-circuit current (often 50kA+ for battery systems); 4) Time-current characteristics - fast-acting for semiconductor protection, time-delay for capacitive loads; 5) Physical size - consider available space and mounting requirements; 6) Standards compliance - UL 248-13 for EV fuses, IEC 60269-7 for DC applications. LiTong provides selection guides and can perform coordination studies for complex systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Download our high-voltage DC fuse selection guide or contact our FAE team with your system parameters for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Sinofuse products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Sinofuse products vary by product type and order volume: 1) Standard EV fuses from stock - immediate shipment for common ratings; 2) Standard products not in stock - 6-8 weeks typical; 3) High-voltage energy storage fuses - 8-10 weeks due to specialized manufacturing; 4) Custom products - 10-12 weeks depending on requirements; 5) Large volume orders - may require 10-12 weeks for production scheduling. LiTong maintains strategic inventory of popular Sinofuse EV and energy storage fuse series to support customer demand. For critical applications, we recommend establishing forecast agreements to ensure supply continuity. Contact our sales team for current lead times on specific part numbers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current stock status and lead times. Consider forecast agreements for high-volume requirements.
